## Wall Street Closes Higher as Investor Focus Shifts to Earnings Season

Risk-on tone at the start of earnings season provides a constructive backdrop for tech names reporting in the near term; the constructive market setup raises the stakes for any guidance disappointment.

- Broad market ended the session higher.
- Investor attention is described as rotating toward the opening of earnings season.
- No company-specific catalyst is named in the headline.
- Story is a market-wrap with a constructive tone but low actionable content.
